nominal_dimensions_mm: OD 64; free height 22 as stack-equivalent photo target; central bore 32; raised/recessed centre register OD 46; register depth 2; outside edge radius R2-R3
material: Black EPDM or NR/SBR automotive mount rubber, Shore A 60 +/-5
fabrication_method: Lathe-cut or mould annular cushion; drill/punch bore; finish faces flat and parallel; no tyre/recycled crumb rubber
hold_points: Confirm center bore against sleeve/cup with calipers before production; confirm whether small mount is one piece or split seat+spacer; confirm final installed stack height after dry-fit
notes: Image-derived dimensions from crushed old samples; Energy 8.4104 cross-check shows 10 medium bushings at 11.43 plus 12 seats at 8.64, so do not approve one-piece 22 mm production until the physical sample proves that construction.

application: Main tub-to-chassis mount stack large pair
nominal_dimensions_mm: OD 78; free height 24; central bore 32; raised/recessed centre register OD 46; register depth 2; outside edge radius R2-R3
material: Black EPDM or NR/SBR automotive mount rubber, Shore A 60 +/-5
fabrication_method: Lathe-cut or mould annular cushion; drill/punch bore; finish faces flat and parallel; no tyre/recycled crumb rubber
hold_points: Confirm large-pair station from old mount map; confirm center bore and final stack height before production
notes: Matches the pre-1/79 working kit count of two large pieces; Energy 8.4104 tall bushing thickness is 24.13 mm, supporting the 24 mm photo target.

nominal_dimensions_mm: ID 10.8-11.0 for M10 bolt; OD to suit BM-SM/BM-LG bore and cup register; length equals free rubber stack minus 3-4 clamp compression
material: Steel tube, zinc plated or painted after cut
fabrication_method: Cut DOM/mechanical tube; deburr both ends; corrosion protect before assembly
hold_points: Measure old sleeve OD and length with calipers; do not infer sleeve OD only from photos
notes: Sleeve controls over-crush; rubber dimensions alone are not enough for final clamp load.

nominal_dimensions_mm: Small cup OD 64 or to match BM-SM; large cup OD 78 or to match BM-LG; M10 clearance hole 11; dish/register depth 2-3
material: Steel, 2.5-3.0 thick, plated or epoxy primed
fabrication_method: Reuse original cups if flat and not thinned; otherwise press/form new cups from steel washer blanks
hold_points: Confirm which old cups are reusable; confirm actual cup OD against chassis/body landing surfaces
notes: Included because the rubber cannot be specified safely without the seat style.

nominal_dimensions_mm: Overall length 96; max width 64; free thickness 15; top hole 12; lower hole 12; hole center spacing 64; rectangular relief 36 x 18 with R3 corners; top metal insert/boss OD 29
material: Black EPDM or NR/SBR automotive mount rubber, Shore A 60 +/-5; steel insert if original design uses one
fabrication_method: Mould or cut from sheet/blank; punch holes; form rectangular relief cleanly; bond/fit steel insert where required
hold_points: Confirm hole center spacing and insert OD directly from sample with calipers before final pair
notes: This is separate from the six main tub stations and must not be mixed with BM-SM/BM-LG pieces.

application: Separate front support/nose-extension strip or bonded liner
nominal_dimensions_mm: Overall trace length 165; working width 38-42; base sheet thickness 8; raised/load pad height 14; end/tab holes M10 clearance 11 or slot 11 x 16 where shown
material: Black EPDM or NR/SBR sheet rubber, Shore A 60 +/-5; rubber-to-metal bond adhesive if carrier is reused
fabrication_method: Trace actual old part and metal carrier; cut sheet rubber with die/waterjet/knife template; punch holes; bond to blasted and primed carrier if required
hold_points: Physical trace required before cutting because samples are curled and torn; confirm all hole centers from metal carrier, not from distorted rubber
notes: Use RRB photos for orientation and thickness, but use the physical part as the master template.

application: Separate front support/nose-extension strip or bonded liner
nominal_dimensions_mm: Mirror FS-STRIP-L unless the physical right-side sample proves asymmetric; same section dimensions as left
material: Black EPDM or NR/SBR sheet rubber, Shore A 60 +/-5; rubber-to-metal bond adhesive if carrier is reused
fabrication_method: Trace actual old part and metal carrier; cut sheet rubber with die/waterjet/knife template; punch holes; bond to blasted and primed carrier if required
hold_points: Physical trace required before cutting because samples are curled and torn; confirm left/right handedness on vehicle
notes: Fabricator should make both sides in one batch so hardness and thickness match.
